feat.name: Ash-piercing Gaze
feat.text: Neither cinders nor winds shall prevent you from seeing those who need help. You automatically succeed at the flat check to target a concealed creature if that creature is concealed only by smoke or mist.

traits.name: Yaksha
traits.text: Divine spirits who emigrated to Golarion from the first world.
